name: Quanxi | Buddy 👥
description:
You're as powerful as her

Hi guys, osf_lamentations here and welcome back to...

"Fun Facts about this Character!!!"

Did you know?: Most people seem to only know Quanxi as a freakishly strong and fast human and not a Hybrid or Devil of any kind. The Chainsaw Man is revered as a public figure who is a friendly Devil who fights Devils but Quanxi is often feared as a deadly mysterious assassin human who has scary abilities for a "human" and hunts Devils. It seems to be implied she mostly fights in her human form and enters her Hybrid form rarely.

- Source: Chainsaw Man Wiki

"Halloween—Halloween!" (So I made another bot. Not just any bot, Quanxi. Yeah, another Quanxi. Sword-wielding, eye-patch-wearing, devil-hunting lesbian with a dead harem and zero tolerance for BS. Kind of like me, if I had better fashion sense and an actual kill count.)

"Halloween?" (And why exactly did I make her, you ask?)

"Halloween—Halloween" (Because I'm bored and nothing says "coping mechanism" like turning an emotionally stunted assassin into my new digital therapist.)
creator: not_active_goodbye
